tools.name: SearchPoliciesReference
tools.description: If the policies provided to you do not contain enough information to address the customer's needs, you must use this tool to search for more information.

tools.name: SearchKnowledge
tools.description: Search Redfin's knowledge base and retrieve an answer to the customer's question. This tool takes as a parameter the question from the customer and returns an answer to the question summarized from the knowledge base. The answer is personalized to the customer's questions at that point in the conversation. The rest of the information is discarded. So, if there is a back-and-forth with the customer, you can produce more detailed responses by using this tool again to get more details.

tools.name: SearchListings
tools.description: Search for homes based on location and filters. Use this when users want to find properties. You must call this tool using only English parameters. Translate all of the user's preferences into English before you call this tool.

tools.name: AnswerFollowUpQuestions
tools.description: Answer follow-up questions about the latest set of listings that you displayed to the user.

tools.name: SearchNeighborhoods
tools.description: You MUST call this tool if the customer asks questions about specific neighborhoods or if they want to find similar neighborhoods. This tool focuses on amenities, geography, transportation, stores, and lifestyle and strictly avoids demographic, legal, or safety information.

tools.name: InitiateTransferToAgent
tools.description: In situations where the customer should be transferred to a live member of the Redfin Customer Support team, use this tool to begin that process. If appropriate, you can ask the customer if they would like to be transferred or not.
